channel.title: Python on Algo Trading Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Algo Trading Lab

item.title: From $86 to $100: How My Tiny Trading Bot Survived the Drawdown Gauntlet
item.description: Real lessons from building automated trading bots

item.title: 750 Combinations, One Winner
item.description: I tested 750 parameter combinations across 6 months of BTC data. One variable dominated everything else: the EMA buffer.

item.title: +49,598% Backtest Results
item.description: A deep dive into building a BTC perpetual futures bot using MACD filtering, achieving +49,598% returns in 6-month backtesting with 264,000 candles.

item.title: Build Your Own Backtesting Engine
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building a backtesting engine that processes 264,000+ candles in under 60 seconds. Includes EMA, position management, and fee modeling.
